messageBoard.loadError: Failed to load. Try again later.

overview.title: Dashboard
overview.apiUnreachableHint: Account info stays visible. Quota will refill automatically after connectivity recovers.

mcp.title: MCP Console
mcp.description: Manage Codex MCP entries directly in AiMaMi.
mcp.name: Name
mcp.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this MCP server?
mcp.pathCopiedDesc: The MCP config file path was copied to the clipboard.

skills.title: Skills Management
skills.description: Import, remove, backup and restore local Codex skills directly in AiMaMi.
skills.pathCopiedDesc: The path text was copied to the clipboard.
skills.loadFailedDesc: Try again later, or check the local Skills directory and reload.
skills.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this skill? A backup will be created automatically.
skills.confirmDeleteBackup: Are you sure you want to delete this backup? This action cannot be undone.

customInstructions.title: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.description: Manage Codex global custom instructions through ~/.codex/AGENTS.md without touching project-level AGENTS rules.
customInstructions.templatesDescription: Built-in templates are available now and admin-managed templates can be attached later.
customInstructions.currentDescription: Only the AiMaMi managed block is shown here. Other handwritten global rules are preserved.
customInstructions.editorDescription: Edit on top of a template, then apply only to the AiMaMi managed block in the global AGENTS file.
customInstructions.editorPlaceholder: Edit the content that will be written into the managed global custom-instructions block
customInstructions.historyDescription: Recent local apply records are kept here so you can roll back quickly.
customInstructions.globalScopeHint: Only manages the AiMaMi block inside global ~/.codex/AGENTS.md
customInstructions.noManagedContent: There is no AiMaMi managed block yet.
customInstructions.clearedManagedContent: This action will clear the AiMaMi managed block.
customInstructions.clearConfirmDescription: This only removes the AiMaMi managed block from ~/.codex/AGENTS.md and preserves any other global rules you wrote yourself.
customInstructions.templatesLoadFailed: Failed to load remote templates. Falling back to built-in templates.
customInstructions.loadFailedDesc: Try again later, or check your network and refresh the page.
customInstructions.previewDescription: This only updates the AiMaMi managed block inside ~/.codex/AGENTS.md. It does not touch project code or project-level AGENTS files.
customInstructions.applySuccessDesc: The AiMaMi managed block was written to ~/.codex/AGENTS.md.
customInstructions.clearSuccessDesc: The AiMaMi managed block was removed from the global AGENTS file.
customInstructions.rollbackSuccess: Rolled back to the selected history
customInstructions.rollbackSuccessDesc: The selected history version replaced the current AiMaMi managed block.
customInstructions.rollbackFailed: Failed to roll back custom instructions

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Diagnose system status, clean redundant data, rebuild registry, and recover local runtime issues.
maintenance.diagnoseDesc: Detect OS, architecture, version and registered account count to verify runtime environment.
maintenance.cleanDesc: Remove redundant auth backups, registry backups and stale snapshot entries to free disk space.
maintenance.rebuildDesc: Scan local snapshot files to regenerate registry, fixing corruption or data inconsistency.
maintenance.restartCodexDesc: Terminate and restart the local Codex process to apply config changes or recover from errors.
maintenance.restartConfirmDesc: This will terminate the current Codex process and restart it. Any ongoing operations may be interrupted.
maintenance.cleanResult: Removed: {{authBackups}} auth backups, {{registryBackups}} registry backups, {{staleEntries}} stale entries
maintenance.forceKillDesc: Find and force terminate all Codex-related processes (app, helpers, CLI, extension servers) to resolve lingering processes blocking router startup.
maintenance.resetConfigDesc: Clear config.toml to restore Codex configuration to defaults. Takes effect after restarting Codex.
maintenance.resetConfigDone: config.toml has been reset. Restart Codex for changes to take effect.
maintenance.imageCompatDesc: Disable image generation tool declarations in relay requests to avoid 403 errors from upstream providers that don't support image generation.
maintenance.imageCompatDone: Updated. This applies to the next relay request.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize AiMaMi appearance, behavior preferences and auto-switch strategy.
settings.apiProxyDesc: Only applies to remote enrichment requests such as quota API, workspace name, expiration time, and subscription metadata refresh.
settings.apiProxyDialogDesc: Configure a dedicated proxy only for AiMaMi remote API requests. Other requests do not use this proxy. If API metadata refresh fails, configure it here.
settings.apiProxySavedDesc: Remote requests for quota and account metadata will use the new proxy route.
settings.refreshIntervalSaveFailedDesc: Kept the current background setting. Please try again later.
settings.thresholdSavedDesc: Auto-switch is off; only the threshold values were updated.
settings.hotspotEnabledDesc: The notch area shows quota percentage; click to return to the main window.
settings.hotspotDisabledDesc: Notch quota display is turned off.
settings.upToDateDesc: You are already on the latest version. No update is needed.
settings.updateCheckFailedDesc: Check your network connection or try again later.
settings.apiProxyDetectFailed: No working proxy address was detected. Please check your VPN or proxy client and enter the correct address manually.
settings.apiProxyTestReachableDirect: Connected to ChatGPT service via direct connection.
settings.apiProxyTestReachableManual: Connected to ChatGPT service via the configured proxy.
settings.apiProxyTestInvalidConfig: The proxy configuration is invalid. Check the proxy URL and scheme.
settings.apiProxyTestClientBuildFailed: Failed to create the proxy client. Check the current proxy settings.
settings.apiProxyTestNetworkFailed: Proxy test failed. Check whether the local proxy is running and whether the network is reachable.
settings.apiProxyTestFailed: Proxy test failed. Please try again later.
settings.thresholdDialogDesc: When the current account's quota percentage drops below the threshold, AiMaMi will prompt you to switch to the account with the most remaining quota and restart Codex.
settings.accentColorDesc: Customize the primary color for buttons, selections and highlights.
settings.heatmapColorDesc: Customize the primary color for heatmaps and charts in the analytics panel.
settings.refreshIntervalDesc: This setting controls only the quota API (wham/usage) auto-refresh cadence.
settings.updateRestartDesc: Requires runtime evidence that an update is installed, so this slice exposes only the boundary entry.
settings.hotspotDesc: Show real-time 5-hour and weekly quota percentages at the notch area. Click to return to the main window.
settings.hotspotNotSupported: Only available on Macs with a notch display. This device is not compatible.
settings.imageCompatDesc: Restored IPC boundary for toggling backend image compatibility.
settings.autoSwitchDesc: When the current account falls below threshold, bring AiMaMi to the front and suggest switching to the account with the most quota.
settings.autoSwitchEnabledDesc: Monitoring uses the new thresholds; you will be prompted to switch when quota is insufficient.
settings.autoSwitchDisabledDesc: You will no longer be prompted to switch when quota is low.
settings.autoSwitchPromptDesc: Current account {{current}} has dropped below the auto-switch threshold. Switch to {{candidate}} and restart Codex to apply it immediately.

common.toastErrorGenericDesc: Check your network, proxy, and backend status, then try again.
common.toastCopiedDesc: Content was copied to the clipboard. You can paste it now.
common.rootErrorDescription: The application root failed to render. Retry or reopen the window.

update.title: Update Available
update.installBlocked: AiMaMi cannot install updates from the current location. Reopen it from the real installed app path and try again.
update.installBlockedReadOnlyLocation: AiMaMi is currently running from a read-only location, so self-update cannot replace the app bundle. Move AiMaMi to Applications or a real local folder, reopen it from that path, then try again.
update.installBlockedAppTranslocation: AiMaMi is currently running from macOS App Translocation in a read-only mount, so self-update cannot write the app bundle. Move AiMaMi to Applications or a real local folder, reopen it from that path, then try again.
update.installPromptDesc: AiMaMi is currently running from a temporary macOS read-only location, so future updates will fail. Move AiMaMi into Applications, then reopen it from the real installed app path.

accounts.description: Manage Codex account login, switching, quota monitoring and auto-rotation.
accounts.empty: No accounts yet. Import one to get started.

io.previewDesc: Review the backup contents before deciding how to import.
io.previewFailed: Could not parse the backup file
io.exportSuccessDesc: Exported {{count}} account(s) to the local backup file.

accounts.addAccountSessionFailedDesc: Make sure you pasted the full ChatGPT session JSON.
accounts.addAccountSessionSuccessDesc: Added {{email}}. To use it, switch to this account from the list.
accounts.addAccountSessionSuccessDescPlaceholder: Added {{email}}. This session has no refresh_token, so you may need to add it again after accessToken expires.
accounts.addAccountSessionDesc: Copy the ChatGPT web session JSON in three steps. AiMaMi converts it with the AxonHub shape and saves it as a local account snapshot.
accounts.addAccountSessionStep1Desc: Make sure the target account is signed in on chatgpt.com in your browser.
accounts.addAccountSessionStep2Desc: Open the /api/auth/session page, then select and copy the full JSON.
accounts.addAccountSessionStep3Desc: Paste the full JSON below, then click Add Account.
accounts.addAccountSessionRisk: This method only ensures an available account when smart routing is enabled. It does not guarantee the account will work like a Codex authorized login for normal official quota usage. If official quota does not work, sign out of Codex and sign in again through authorization — AiMaMi will add the account to your list automatically.
accounts.addAccountSessionPlaceholder: Paste the full JSON returned by https://chatgpt.com/api/auth/session…
accounts.addAccountSessionOverwrite: Overwrite the old snapshot if the same account already exists locally (the active account is still protected)
accounts.confirmRemove: Remove the local snapshot for {{email}}? This only deletes the auth snapshot stored on this device and will not delete the platform account itself.
accounts.removeActiveDisabled: The currently active account cannot be removed.
accounts.selectHint: Select an account from the list to view details
accounts.switchConfirmDesc: AiMaMi will replace the active auth snapshot with {{email}}. Codex will restart to apply the new account.

tokenStatus.freshDesc: OAuth credential is healthy; latest data fetched from chatgpt.com.
tokenStatus.refreshedDesc: This refresh used the refresh_token to mint a new access_token; new snapshot saved.
tokenStatus.noRefreshTokenDesc: Local snapshot has no refresh_token, can't refresh automatically. Please sign in again for this account.
tokenStatus.refreshReusedDesc: OpenAI rejected the refresh (refresh_token already consumed, often because this account was signed in on another device). Please sign in again.
tokenStatus.refreshFailedDesc: Transient error from OpenAI / network / proxy. Will retry on next refresh.

sessions.description: View and manage all Codex project threads and child threads.
sessions.deleteLagHint: After deleting a thread, the Codex client display may lag briefly. Please note this.
sessions.deleteSelectionDesc: This deletes the currently selected {{count}} thread records. This action cannot be undone.
sessions.treeDescription: Threads are grouped by project. Main threads can expand into child threads.

relay.title: Relay Models
relay.description: Configure relay models for Codex; switch freely from the menu when smart router is on.

codexRouter.codexRunningDescription: AiMaMi asked Codex to quit, but Codex is still running. To avoid damaging historical thread files and state_5.sqlite, quit Codex completely by hand and try again.
codexRouter.migrationPendingHint: {{pending}} older historical threads keep their original provider; opening them still uses ChatGPT directly, identical to having the smart router off.
codexRouter.warnUserProfileExists: Codex is not using AiMaMi's current router config. Disable and re-enable the smart router, or open Diagnostics to inspect the config state.
codexRouter.warnUserProfileExistsTitle: Smart router config is not active
codexRouter.title: Codex Smart Router
codexRouter.subtitle: Let both the Codex desktop client and Codex IDE plugins list official + relay models, and switch between them.
codexRouter.providerOperationLocked: Codex Smart Router is enabled. Relay model operations are blocked. Turn off Codex Smart Router before making changes.

diagnostic.title: System Diagnostics
diagnostic.description: Comprehensive check of Codex runtime: config files, auth state, process health, thread data, disk permissions and API key integrity. Fix issues with one click.

fetchModels.empty: Upstream returned no models. Type the model ID manually.
fetchModels.success: Fetched {{count}} models. Pick one from the dropdown on the right.

form.scope: Scoped to Codex desktop & IDE plugins
form.name: Name
form.apiKeyStoredHint: Stored in OS keychain (macOS Keychain / Windows Credential Manager). Leave blank to keep it.
form.wireApiOpenaiResponses: GPT Protocol (Passthrough Responses API, upstream must support)
form.wireApiOpenaiChat: OpenAI Compatible (Translated to Chat Completions, works with all)

network.label: Force direct connection (bypass system proxy)
network.tunHintAria: About the scope of force direct connection
network.tunHint: Only affects HTTP_PROXY / system proxy. TUN-mode tools (Clash, Surge enhanced mode, etc.) intercept traffic at the OS network stack — no userspace setting can bypass that. Add a DIRECT rule for this hostname inside your proxy app instead.
network.description: Use for relays that are reachable without a proxy; keep off for overseas relays that require your system proxy.

io.exportSuccessDescWithKeys:
Exported {{count}} provider(s) including plaintext API keys — keep the file safe
{{path}}
io.confirmExportDesc: The file will contain provider configs (baseUrl / model / protocol / custom headers). Tick the option below to also include plaintext API keys for one-click cross-machine migration; otherwise the importer must re-enter keys.
io.includeApiKeysHint: Only tick when moving between your own machines. Do NOT upload the file to public repos or chat groups.

relay.empty: No relay models yet for this IDE — click "Add Relay Model" to add one.
relay.testDraftHint: You changed the form without saving. This only tests the current draft and won't refresh the badge in the list.
relay.confirmDelete: Delete this provider? This cannot be undone.
relay.extraHeadersInvalid: Must be valid JSON object, e.g. {"X-Trace":"v1"}
relay.anthropicBaseUrlHint: Anthropic protocol: trailing /v1 will be stripped on save.

preset.title: Pick a preset
preset.description: Import a curated relay provider, then just fill in your API key and model ID.

system.title: Follow system proxy
system.desc: Default behavior: honor system proxy and HTTPS_PROXY env vars. Required for overseas relays.

direct.title: Force direct connection
direct.desc: Bypass system proxy and env vars. Use for relays that are directly reachable to avoid extra latency.

dialog.title: Set network mode
dialog.description: Choose how AiMaMi connects to {{name}} when forwarding upstream requests.
dialog.tunHint: Only affects HTTP_PROXY / system proxy. TUN-mode proxies (Clash, Surge enhanced) intercept traffic at the OS network stack and no userspace setting can bypass them — add a DIRECT rule inside your proxy app instead.

plugins.description: Manage AiMaMi's built-in plugins and extensions. Enable or disable as needed.

trayShell.description: Restores the tray shell module entry from notification client and window focus IPC contracts.

voice.skeletonDescription: The original voice feature is not treated as a restored public feature in the current scope, so the frontend only keeps the route and contract boundary.
voice.skeletonBoundary: Future work must start from repository evidence and fill the module owner gradually before adding any executable voice behavior.
voice.description: Turn pasted transcription results, spoken drafts, and project vocabulary into Codex-ready task briefs, review prompts, and concise change summaries.
voice.templateDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe when this template should be used.
voice.selectedTextPlaceholder: Paste the code, copy, or issue text that should be referenced by the template.

feedback.errorDesc: The server did not accept this submission. Try again later.
feedback.networkErrorDesc: Check your connection or proxy and try again.
feedback.noDevice: Could not read device id. Try again later.

mysteryCode.successDesc: Related entries are now visible in the sidebar.
mysteryCode.successIdempotent: This device has already redeemed this code. No need to repeat.
mysteryCode.toastErrorHint: Review the instructions or contact an administrator, then try again.
